theme_overview: Premium, luxurious, modern event management platform targeting weddings and corporate events in India. Fuses 'Apple-style' clean glassmorphism with traditional Indian festive colors (Crimson Red, Gold, Cream/White).

secondary.name: Luxury Gold
secondary.usage: Highlights, icons, stars, borders on premium cards

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] rounded-2xl

motion.liquid_hover: relative overflow-hidden group hover:shadow-lg after:absolute after:inset-0 after:bg-white/20 after:translate-y-[100%] hover:after:translate-y-0 after:transition-transform after:duration-300

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for containers.
grids_and_layouts.masonry_gallery: columns-1 sm:columns-2 md:columns-3 lg:columns-4 gap-4 space-y-4

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over glassmorphism has minimum 4.5:1 contrast. Use drop-shadows on text if placed directly over images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or rounded-xl. Primary: bg-red-800 text-white. Secondary: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur text-stone-900 border border-stone-200. Apply liquid_hover rule.
components.floating_actions: Fixed bottom-right z-50. Stacked vertically. WhatsApp icon (green) and Call Now icon (amber/gold). Pulse animation for attention.
components.cards: Glassmorphism base, p-8 padding, rounded-2xl, soft shadow. Avoid hard borders.
components.navbar: Sticky top-0, z-40. Crystal glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40). DO NOT use transparent bg.
components.admin_dashboard: Use sharp/dense UI for admin (not glassmorphism). Standard Shadcn tables, charts, and flat cards with 1px border-border.

image_urls.description: Elegant wedding reception tables with floral decorations
Luxurious wedding banquet hall with chandeliers
Elegant buffet setup in stainless steel chafing dishes
Red and white floral umbrella / mandap

page_structures.Home: Hero Section (Image bg + Glass Title Card + CTAs), Services Preview (3 columns glass cards), Featured Packages (Dynamic grid), Gallery Preview (Masonry limited items), Testimonials slider.
page_structures.About: Business intro, timeline/experience, 'Why Choose Us' bento grid mapping value props.
page_structures.Services: Detailed views of Catering, Banquet Hall, Decoration. Alternating left/right image + text blocks with heavy padding.
page_structures.Packages: Dynamic grid fetched from MongoDB. Categorized (Wedding, Food, Corporate) using generic Shadcn Tabs (styled to match theme).
page_structures.Gallery: Full masonry grid. CSS-based filters (buttons that change state and filter mapped array).
page_structures.Reviews: Testimonials list, star ratings (text-amber-500), masonry or bento layout.
page_structures.Booking: Glassmorphism form inside a centered max-w-2xl card. Connects to FastAPI backend.
page_structures.Contact: Premium layout with Google Maps embed on one side (rounded-2xl overflow-hidden), contact info/form on the other.
page_structures.Admin_Dashboard: Sidebar navigation. Data tables (Shadcn UI) for CRUD operations (Packages, Gallery, Bookings, Reviews). Flat/dense cards for admin stats.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup required fonts in index.css using Google Fonts imports for 'Outfit' and 'Playfair Display'.
Update tailwind.config.js to include these fonts (sans: 'Outfit', serif: 'Playfair Display').
Build standard React components (.js/.jsx) with Tailwind. Ensure no framer-motion is used.
All animations must be purely CSS-based. Use 'group-hover', 'transition-all', 'duration-300'.
Implement the Floating WhatsApp & Call Buttons globally in the App layout, fixed bottom right, stacked vertically.
Ensure the Admin section uses a clean, dense interface to distinguish it from the marketing side.
Fetch dynamic data (packages, gallery, reviews) using Axios or fetch inside useEffect hooks.
Implement 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements as per the critical rules.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You MUST NOT apply universal transition 'transition: all' in global CSS. Apply specific transitions to components.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is strictly forbidden).
DO NOT use emojis for icons. Use lucide-react (already installed).
Provide generous spacing (2-3x more than typical). Never cramp UI elements.
Prioritize Shadcn/UI components but customize them to match the glassmorphism red/gold/white theme for user-facing pages.
Never use generic flat colors for the marketing site; always introduce subtle shadows, borders, or glassmorphism to create depth.
